zh.lifeSummary: 當THOMAS HIGHAM IV於1419年3月21日出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可加澤利時，他的父親Thomas Higham III20歲，母親Alice Boyes22歲。他於1444年與Margaret Tamworth在英國結婚。他去世於1480年3月21日在英國素福爾可加澤利享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当THOMAS HIGHAM IV于1419年3月21日出生在英国英格兰素福爾可加澤利时，他的父亲Thomas Higham III20岁，母亲Alice Boyes22岁。他于1444年与Margaret Tamworth在英国结婚。他去世于1480年3月21日在英国素福爾可加澤利享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: HIGHAM
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places called Higham (Lancashire, Yorkshire, Derbyshire, Leicestershire, Northamptonshire, Bedfordshire, Warwickshire, Essex, and Kent) or from Heigham in Norfolk. Most of the placenames derive from Old English hēah ‘high’ + hām ‘village, homestead’, though the Norfolk placename may come from Old English hecg ‘hedge’ or hecc ‘hatch, gate’ + hām.

nameMeanings.name: THOMAS
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When THOMAS HIGHAM IV was born on 21 March 1419, in Gazeley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Higham III, was 20 and his mother, Alice Boyes, was 22. He married Margaret Tamworth in 1444, in England. He died on 21 March 1480, in Gazeley, Suffolk, England, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque THOMAS HIGHAM IV est né le 21 mars 1419, à Gazeley, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Higham III, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Alice Boyes, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Tamworth en 1444, à Angleterre. Il est décédé le 21 mars 1480, à Gazeley, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als THOMAS HIGHAM IV am 21. März 1419 in Gazeley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Higham III 20 und seine Mutter Alice Boyes 22. Er hat 1444 in England Margaret Tamworth geheiratet. Er starb am 21. März 1480 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Gazeley, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando THOMAS HIGHAM IV è nato il il 21 marzo 1419 nel Gazeley, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Higham III, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Alice Boyes, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Tamworth nel 1444, nel England. Morì il 21 marzo 1480, nel Gazeley, Suffolk, England, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: THOMAS HIGHAM IVが1419年3月21日にイギリスイギリススフォルクガズエリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Higham IIIは20歳，母Alice Boyesは22歳であった。1444年にイギリスでMargaret Tamworthと結婚した。彼は1480年3月21日にイギリススフォルクガズエリーで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: THOMAS HIGHAM IV(이)가 1419년 3월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 게이즈리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Higham III(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Boyes(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1444년 영국에서 Margaret Tamworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1480년 3월 21일 영국 수폴크 게이즈리에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.21 March 1419–21 March 1480: 21 de março de 1419–21 de março de 1480
pt.lifeSummary: Quando THOMAS HIGHAM IV nasceu em 21 de março de 1419, em Gazeley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Higham III, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Alice Boyes, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Tamworth em 1444, em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 21 de março de 1480, em Gazeley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда THOMAS HIGHAM IV родился 21 марта 1419 г. в местности газели, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Higham III было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Boyes, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Tamworth в 1444 г. в местности Англия. Он умер 21 марта 1480 г. в местности газели, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 61 год.

es.21 March 1419–21 March 1480: 21 de marzo de 1419–21 de marzo de 1480

Se casó con Margaret Tamworth en 1444, en Inglaterra. Murió el 21 de marzo de 1480, en Gazeley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años.
